title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CGI India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? CGI India Capital India in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
